description: issue #207: `show_turtle`/`hide_turtle` take no arguments; the parenthesized form `(show_turtle 1)` supplies one, raising `ol-too-many-inputs` at runtime (the bare form's extra tokens would instead fail at parse time as a stray-token diagnostic, since show_turtle/hide_turtle's registered arity is 0 - see packages/parser/src/signatures.ts).
